how_it_works.title: Three steps to sign
how_it_works.subtitle: The simplest process to obtain legally valid digital signatures.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Load the document from your computer and enter the signer's email.
how_it_works.step2_desc: An automatic email is sent with a unique link and a 4-digit security code.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Download the document with the embedded signature and full audit trail.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about digital signing with Firmiu.
faq.q1: Is the digital signature legally valid?
faq.a1: Yes. Signatures generated by Firmiu are legally valid across Latin America in accordance with current electronic signature laws, including Argentina, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Mexico, and more.
faq.q2: Do I need to install any software?
faq.a2: No. Firmiu works 100% in the browser. No software or plugins need to be installed on your computer or mobile device.
faq.q3: How does the signer know the document is legitimate?
faq.a3: The signer receives a 4-digit verification code by email. Only the person with that code can sign the document, guaranteeing its authenticity.
faq.q4: What if the signer doesn't have a Firmiu account?
faq.a4: The signer doesn't need to create an account. They receive the unique link by email and sign directly from the browser, without registering.
faq.q5: How long does it take to sign a document?
faq.a5: The entire process takes less than 2 minutes: the signer receives the email, opens the link, draws their signature, and enters the verification code.
faq.q6: Can I sign from a mobile phone?
faq.a6: Yes. The process is optimized for mobile devices. The signer can draw their signature with their finger directly on the touch screen.
faq.a7: Your documents are stored encrypted on secure servers with AES-256 encryption. Only you and authorized signers can access them.
faq.q8: Can I try Firmiu for free?
faq.a8: Yes. The free plan includes 3 documents per month with no credit card required. You can upgrade at any time when you need more capacity.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By accessing or using Firmiu, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not use the service.
terms.s1_body: Your use of Firmiu constitutes full acceptance of these Terms. They apply to all users, including those who only browse the platform. Firmiu reserves the right to update these terms and will notify users of significant changes by email.
terms.s2_body: Firmiu is a PDF electronic signature platform that allows users to send documents to recipients to sign digitally from any device. The service includes secure cloud storage, a complete audit trail, and automatic email notifications.
terms.s3_body: To use Firmiu you must create an account by providing accurate and complete information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and all activity that occurs under your account. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use at soporte@firmiu.com.
terms.s4_body: You may only use Firmiu for lawful and legitimate purposes. Strictly prohibited: (a) using the service for fraudulent, deceptive, or illegal activities; (b) sending documents with unlawful or harmful content; (c) attempting to access other users' accounts; (d) using the service to send unsolicited communications; (e) interfering with the security or operation of the service.
terms.s5_body: Signatures generated by Firmiu are electronic signatures with legal validity in Latin American countries that have enacted electronic signature legislation (including Costa Rica, Colombia, Mexico, Argentina, Chile, and others). The specific validity depends on the applicable jurisdiction and document type. Firmiu does not provide legal advice. For documents requiring notarization or other additional formalities, consult a legal professional.
terms.s6_body: Firmiu offers a free plan with limited features and paid plans with expanded capabilities. Paid plans are billed monthly in US dollars (USD). You may cancel at any time; access to plan features remains active until the end of the current billing period. No refunds are issued for partial periods, except as required by applicable law.
terms.s7_body: Firmiu and all its content, design, code, trademarks, and features are the exclusive property of Firmiu and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, sell, or create derivative works without express written authorization.
terms.s8_body: Firmiu is provided as-is without warranties of any kind, express or implied. To the maximum extent permitted by law, Firmiu shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, punitive, or consequential damages, including data loss, business losses, or damages arising from the use or inability to use the service.
terms.s9_body: Firmiu may suspend or cancel your access to the service at any time if you violate these Terms, without prior notice or liability. You may cancel your own account at any time from the Settings section of your dashboard. Following cancellation, your data will be deleted in accordance with our Privacy Policy.
terms.s10_body: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of material changes by email at least 15 days in advance. Continued use of Firmiu after the effective date of the new terms implies acceptance.
terms.s11_body: These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of the Republic of Costa Rica. For any dispute that cannot be resolved amicably, the parties submit to the jurisdiction of the competent courts of San José, Costa Rica.
terms.meta_description: Read Firmiu's Terms of Service: usage conditions, plans, responsibilities, intellectual property, cancellations and governing law.
terms.meta_keywords: firmiu terms of service, digital signature terms, electronic signature terms and conditions, firmiu agreement
terms.s12_body: For inquiries, claims, or requests related to these Terms of Service, contact us at legal@firmiu.com. We will respond within a maximum of 5 business days.
terms.s13_body: Paid subscriptions can be cancelled at any time from your account dashboard. We do not issue refunds for partial periods once the monthly charge has been processed. Free plans have no charges or commitments. For more information, see our full Refund Policy.

privacy.meta_description: Firmiu's Privacy Policy: how we collect, use and protect your personal data and documents. GDPR compliance and Latin American data protection laws.
privacy.meta_keywords: firmiu privacy policy, digital signature data protection, electronic signature privacy, GDPR firmiu
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Firmiu we are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and how we protect it.
privacy.s1_body: We collect: (a) Account data: name, email address, and encrypted password when you register. (b) Documents: the PDF files you upload and the signers' data (name and email). (c) Signature data: IP address, user-agent, browser, operating system, date and time of each signature, as part of the audit trail. (d) Usage data: pages visited and actions taken within the service. (e) Payment data: managed by Paddle; Firmiu does not store card numbers.
privacy.s2_body: We use your information to: provide the electronic signature service and manage your account; send notifications about the status of your documents; generate legally valid audit trails; improve the security and performance of the service; comply with legal and regulatory obligations; process payments through Paddle.
privacy.s3_body: Your documents are stored encrypted on secure cloud servers (Supabase on AWS infrastructure). We use encryption in transit via HTTPS/TLS and encryption at rest. Access to documents is controlled through Row Level Security (RLS) policies. Only you and authorized signers can access your documents.
privacy.s4_body: We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties. We share data only: with designated signers, to complete the document signing process; with service providers necessary to operate (Supabase for storage, Resend for emails, Paddle for payments); when required by law, court order, or competent authority.
privacy.s5_body: You have the right to: access the personal data we hold about you; request correction of incorrect information; request deletion of your account and data; export your documents before deleting your account; object to the processing of your data in certain circumstances. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacidad@firmiu.com.
privacy.s6_body: Firmiu uses only strictly necessary cookies to keep your session active and ensure the secure operation of the service. We do not use third-party tracking, advertising, or behavioral analytics cookies.
privacy.s7_body: Documents and signatures are retained according to your plan: 30 days on the Free plan, 1 year on the Starter plan, and unlimited on Pro and Business plans. Account data is retained while the account remains active. After account deletion, your data is erased within a maximum of 30 days.
privacy.s8_body: Firmiu is not directed at persons under 18 years of age and we do not intentionally collect personal information from minors. If you believe a minor has provided personal information, contact us at privacidad@firmiu.com to have it removed.
privacy.s9_body: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of material changes by email at least 15 days in advance. The date of the last update will always be visible at the top of this document.
privacy.s10_body: For any inquiry, request, or complaint related to your privacy and personal data, contact us at privacidad@firmiu.com. We will respond within a maximum of 5 business days.
privacy.security_badge: 100% encrypted · Secure storage · No data sales
privacy.security_desc: Your documents are protected with AES-256 encryption at rest and TLS in transit.

about.meta_keywords: about firmiu, digital signature company latin america, firmiu mission, electronic signature latam, firmiu team
about.title: About Firmiu
about.subtitle: We simplify digital signing for all of Latin America.
about.mission_body: Firmiu was created to eliminate the slow and inefficient process of printing, signing by hand, scanning, and resending documents. We believe every professional in Latin America deserves a simple, secure, and affordable tool for digital document signing.
about.for_who_subtitle: Designed for professionals who need fast and reliable signatures.
about.value_1_desc: No technical complications. If a non-technical professional can use it, we're doing it right.
about.value_2_desc: Full audit trail on every signature: IP, device, location, and date are all recorded.
about.value_3_desc: Fair pricing designed for the Latin American market.

refund.meta_keywords: firmiu refund policy, digital signature subscription cancellation, electronic signature refund, cancel firmiu plan
refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: This policy describes the conditions under which Firmiu handles cancellations and refund requests.
refund.s1_body: Firmiu offers monthly subscription plans. By subscribing to a paid plan, you agree to the terms described in this policy. We are not responsible for refunds for periods during which the service was available and you had active access.
refund.s2_body: We do not issue refunds for partial periods once the monthly charge has been processed. However, if you experience a technical issue attributable to Firmiu that prevented you from using the service for 72 hours or more within a billed period, you may request a proportional refund by emailing support@firmiu.com with the incident details.
refund.s3_body: You can cancel your subscription at any time from the Account section in your dashboard. Upon cancellation, your plan remains active until the end of the current billing period, with no additional charges. No refunds are issued for the remaining time in the period.
refund.s4_body: Exceptions to this policy only apply when required by applicable law in your jurisdiction. In case of a dispute, contact us at legal@firmiu.com before initiating any chargeback process with your financial institution. We address all requests within a maximum of 5 business days.
